label: Hard Block
description: Expired reagent lot — consumable FAIL triggers immediate device lockdown.
messages: Lot expiry date is 2026-01-15, opened 4 days ago
Stored refrigerated at 4C, no temperature excursions, freeze indicator has not tripped

label: Environmental Breach
description: Temperature excursion (9°C for 3h) — storage FAIL invalidates QC session.
messages: Refrigerated storage, had a temperature excursion at 9 degrees C for 3 hours, freeze indicator has not tripped

label: Hardware Drift
description: 2 consecutive QC failures — historical FAIL triggers secondary reference run.
messages: Refrigerated at 4C, no excursions, freeze indicator not tripped
2 consecutive QC failures in the last 30 days

label: High-Priority Sprint
description: Active EQA cycle with deadline within 7 days — eqa_status WARN, device cleared.
messages: Refrigerated at 4C, no excursions, freeze indicator not tripped

notes: eqa_deadline_date must be within 7 days of today for WARN to trigger. Adjust the date when re-running.
